tags.name: disco-markdown
tags.description: Renders Markdown content with Discobot-compatible streaming, code, math, CJK, and diagram support.

attributes.name: markdown
attributes.description: Markdown source text to render. If omitted, the element may initialize from slotted text content.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Rendering mode for complete or streaming markdown.

attributes.name: is-animating
attributes.description: Whether the markdown stream is currently animating or incomplete.
